About Me

Hello 👋, I'm Tejasv Makkar!

I work at the intersection of business strategy, data, and automation. With a Master's in General Management and a background in Computer Science, I bridge the gap between business needs and technical execution — translating complex processes into clear, scalable solutions.

My toolkit includes Power BI, SQL, n8n, Make, and low-code/no-code tools — and I actively use Vibe coding to rapidly prototype and ship solutions that would otherwise take weeks. Beyond formal roles, I've voluntarily helped couple of businesses streamline operations and eliminate repetitive work — and I'm always open to a good problem. If you've got one, let's think it through together.

Based in Erfurt, Germany — open to relocation.

AI Automation

Automated Job Fetch + AI Resume Generator

End-to-end agentic system that fetches job listings, scores them via NLP matching, generates tailored cover letters, and outputs ATS-friendly resumes. Turns a 3-hour manual process into a fully automated pipeline.

AI AgentsNLPn8nATS
Document AI

AI Invoice & Receipt Reader

Intelligent document processing that reads invoices from any format, extracts amounts, dates, vendor names, and tax breakdowns, then structures everything cleanly into a database. Eliminates manual data-entry errors entirely.

Vibe Coding

Building at the
Speed of Thought

I embrace vibe coding — the art of building software by describing intent to AI, letting tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf turn ideas into working systems at unprecedented speed.

This isn't just about writing code faster. It's a fundamentally different creative process — one where the barrier between idea and execution collapses. I pair deep business understanding with AI capabilities to ship solutions that used to take weeks in hours.

Combined with my n8n automation expertise, I build complete AI-powered workflows — from data ingestion to intelligent decision-making — without getting stuck in implementation details.

⚡ Rapid Prototyping 🤖 AI-First Development 🔗 Workflow Automation 🎯 Problem-First Thinking
Journey

Experience & Milestones

Professional experience, education, and achievements that shaped my career.

05/2025 – Present

🤝 Voluntary Automation Projects (Independent) — Voluntary / Pro Bono

Designed and delivered four workflow automation solutions for businesses in my personal network, building real-world project experience during the job search.

10/2024 – 01/2025

💼 Business Analyst Intern — KTJ Advisory UG, Hamburg

Supported investor pitch decks, identified 50+ potential renewable energy investors, and collaborated in roadmap planning and milestone tracking for investment initiatives.

07/2022 – 10/2022

🏫 Student Admin Assistant — PFH Göttingen

Assisted international students with onboarding and administrative procedures. Primary contact for inquiries, maintained records using Salesforce CRM.

01/2019 – 11/2021

📋 Associate Project Coordinator — Gravity Technologies, India

Supported IT/CRM and geo-mapping projects, facilitated Agile/Scrum ceremonies, produced documentation using Jira & Confluence, and assisted sales teams with CRM demos and technical feasibility.

2022 – 2025

🎓 Master's in General Management (Grade 1.9) — PFH Göttingen

Specialization in Sales, Marketing, and E-Business. Built a strong strategic and analytical foundation for data-driven business leadership.

2023

🥇 1st Place — Business Simulation Game

Led Team Justice League to victory in a competitive strategic business simulation. Received a signed copy of "21 Lessons for the 21st Century" by Yuval Noah Harari as a reward from Prof. Stefan.

2025

🤖 AI & Automation Builder

Self-directed journey building Agentic AI systems, automation pipelines (n8n, Make), and data analytics solutions at the intersection of business strategy and intelligent technology.

June 2025

🇩🇪 Zertifikat Deutsch B1

German language certification at B1 level from Phonem Sprachschule, demonstrating commitment to integration and cross-cultural communication.
